extension.description: Route named Codex identities across local, WSL, SSH, and shared environments
configuration.title: Codex Identity Router
configuration.activeProfileScope.descrip: Where to store active profile selection
configuration.storageMode.description: Where profile credentials are stored. In auto mode, SSH remote sessions use a shared remote file store and local sessions use SecretStorage
configuration.storageMode.auto: Choose automatically. SSH remote sessions use the shared remote file store and local sessions use SecretStorage
configuration.storageMode.secretStorage: Store tokens in VS Code SecretStorage and profile metadata in VS Code global storage
configuration.storageMode.remoteFiles: Store tokens and shared profile state in the default remote files directory ~/.codex-switch
configuration.storageMode.customRemoteFi: Store tokens and shared profile state in a machine-specific custom directory
configuration.remoteFilesRoot.descriptio: Machine-specific path for the shared profile store when storageMode is customRemoteFiles. This setting is not synchronized
configuration.reloadWindowAfterProfileSw: Reload VS Code window after successful profile switch/import so Codex extension re-reads auth.json
configuration.statusBarClickBehavior.des: Behavior when clicking the status bar profile item
configuration.statusBarClickBehavior.tog: Toggle between current and previous profile
command.login.title: Codex Identity Router: Login Help
command.profile.manage.title: Codex Identity Router: Manage Profiles
command.profile.login.title: Codex Identity Router: Login (Codex CLI)
command.profile.switch.title: Codex Identity Router: Switch Profile
command.profile.toggleLast.title: Codex Identity Router: Cycle Profiles
command.profile.addFromCodexAuthFile.tit: Codex Identity Router: Add From Current auth.json
command.profile.addFromFile.title: Codex Identity Router: Import From File
command.profile.exportSettings.title: Codex Identity Router: Export Profiles
command.profile.importSettings.title: Codex Identity Router: Import Profiles
